com.mentor.chs.api

Class IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.mentor.chs.api.IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    IXGraphicConversions.XCGMContext, IXGraphicConversions.XDXFContext, IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext, IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext, IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext
    Enclosing interface:
    IXGraphicConversions

    @NotToBeImplemented
public abstract static class IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Detail

      • m_displayPlaneSpliceGraphics

        public boolean m_displayPlaneSpliceGraphics
        This setting is used in the context of Topology or Integrator diagram to indicate if the splice graphics should be displayed on the generated

        In 2011.1 this only influences SVG diagram production. However it is included here as it is expected that this support will expand in future releases.

      • m_backgroundColor

        public java.awt.Color m_backgroundColor
        This is used in the context of rendering a symbol as an image to indicate which background color to use. default value is 'null'. It indicates that 'background' color of the active session will be used. This is to support backward compatibility. To use a different color, Pl override this value.

        This is added here to address defect dts0100981662. However it is included here as it is expected that this feature may be needed for SVG, PDF, DXF export of symbols as well as diagrams.

    • Constructor Detail

      • XBaseContext

        public XBaseContext()
